content.en:
"Reincarnation is born!"

Ye Tian opened this Dao-level natal talent, and a gate of reincarnation emerged.

Then, Ye Tian stepped into the gate of reincarnation, and ingested a wisp of the breath of the Life Green Clan, and his body changed rapidly, transforming from the body of the Human Race to the Life Green Clan, and the breath on his body quickly fell, and in a while, it became the size of a baby of the Life Green Clan.

But even if it is the size of a baby, the breath of a body is enough to compare to the average god general.

Soon, Ye Tian's temporary reincarnation of the Life Green Clan baby began to grow rapidly, becoming a child and a teenager, and the aura on his body became stronger and stronger, but it was far from reaching the realm of Heavenly Destiny.

In the Life Green Clan, under the rank of soldiers, there are ordinary clansmen and elite clansmen, the elite clansmen are equivalent to the Heavenly Mandate realm, and the ordinary clansmen are equivalent to the god general level.

As for the specific division, it is not, because the Life Green Clan grows very fast, and it is not very difficult to become a soldier, as long as it is practiced for a period of time, it can be easily achieved.

The level that is really difficult to reach is the Guardian level, and only a few Life Greens can advance to the Guardian level.

------------

Although most of the Life Green people live in tree cities, there are still many Life Green villages on the land, and the strength of these villages is very weak, and many villages do not even have a soldier-level powerhouse.

But this is the kind of village that is most suitable for Ye Tian's early development, because the monitoring here is very weak, if he goes to Tree City alone, even if he is reincarnated as a Life Green Clan, he will be screened layer by layer.

In case a little trace is leaked, it will be troublesome.

Therefore, Ye Tian chose a weak Life Green Village and joined in at an opportune time.

In this way, year after year, Ye Tian's reincarnated Life Green Clan people really grew up.

Five years later.

Ye Tian is already an elite-level clansman of the Life Green Clan, such strength is already very strong in the village, coupled with the several combat skills created by Ye Tian, plus the sense of battle, etc., it is enough to compete with the soldier level.

Next, Ye Tian found an opportunity to enter a tree city as a representative of the village elite - Bayin City!

Bayin City is far beyond the village, with one Ancestor level, ten Great Saint Ancestors, and more than a hundred Saint Ancestors, as for the escort level, it is even more, it is difficult to calculate.

The population of the entire Bayin City is almost more than 10 billion, and such a powerful tree city can be said to be the absolute master of hundreds of millions of territories.

Every year, the elites of each village join Bayin City, and Ye Tian's goal is to join Bayin City.

Although Ye Tian can also cultivate alone, but in this way, the origin of his strength will not be clear, like this step by step, everything will be reasonable, so as not to arouse the suspicion of the high-level of the Life Green Clan.

After Ye Tian showed a little strength and combat ability, and a certain talent, he successfully joined Bayin City, and then entered the elite military academy of Bayin City, once he graduated from this military school, he could become the official soldier of Bayin City, and if the best reached the level of the escort team, he could even form his own team.

After Ye Tian joined Bayin City, he no longer hid his talent, and grew up rapidly with a talent that far surpassed that of other geniuses, and even attracted the attention of one Saint Ancestor after another.

The name of Ye Tiantiancai also began to spread to the entire Bayin City.

In the name of genius, no matter how much Ye Tian's strength is improved, it will not make people doubt, in this case, Ye Tian tried his best to improve his strength.

However, in the end, it is the path of the Life Green Clan, which is different from the previous cultivation path, everything needs to be explored by yourself, so it is difficult to quickly grow to the level of the Guardian Team.

But in a hundred years, Ye Tian still reached the level of the escort team, but the foundation could not be too strong.

But Ye Tian didn't care, this body was only temporarily reincarnated, and when he lifted the reincarnation innate nature, all this power would turn into nothingness, so there was no need to survive.

The Life Green Clan has a relatively large span at the level of the Guardian Rank, and the top Guardian Clan can easily kill a group of ordinary Guardian Ranks.

Unlike cultivators from the outside world, after the Life Green Clan becomes a guardian level, they need to absorb life energy to refine their bodies and bloodlines, and constantly improve their strength, once they are promoted to the limit of their bodies, they will achieve the signs of life atavism, and once the atavism is successful, it is the Holy Ancestor!

This process is a slow process and takes a long time.

But it is not very difficult to speed up this process, you only need to cultivate the life technique that fits your own body, or obtain a high-energy level of life crystals.

Of course.

Merge Treasures can also speed up this process, and it works very well.

Because of this, the Life Green Clan went to cultivate the Hedao treasures, but Ye Tian couldn't waste the Hedao treasures, so the creation of the Life Technique and the Life Crystallization could make him grow up quickly.

In order to be able to create a life exercise, Ye Tian paid a huge price and directly took a Heavenly Soul Pill, which created a top-notch life exercise that had reached a perfect level of compatibility with himself.

Then, Ye Tian continued to take on tasks, entered various dangerous places, and tried his best to obtain life crystals.

Occasionally, Ye Tian also used time to speed up his cultivation.

In this way, Ye Tian's strength increased rapidly, and he went farther and farther at the level of the escort team.

One day five hundred years later, Ye Tian's strength had risen to the level of a top guard, but in terms of combat effectiveness, it was second only to the Holy Ancestor level.

After reaching this level, Ye Tian found that his strength had stagnated, and he had no way to continue to improve.

Ye Tian knew very well that this was the innate limitation of reincarnation, limited by the realm and strength of the ontology, this reincarnated body could not surpass the previous one.

"We must find a way to enter the Sacred Mountain of Life!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

With his current strength, coupled with the name of genius, he is recognized as a saint ancestor, coupled with the almost invincible strength of the owner's escort team, his status in Bayin City is very high.

It's just that his foundation is too shallow, so he can't enter the high-level of Bayin City, but he also knows many high-level people.

Under Ye Tian's step-by-step scrutiny, he finally knew a little about the situation of the Life God Mountain.

"It turns out that the Life Divine Mountain is the origin of the Life Green Clan, and it contains the highest inheritance of the Life Green Clan!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

Ordinary Life Green Clan and even ordinary Guardian level don't know this secret at all, and if it weren't for his high status, I'm afraid he wouldn't know this secret either.

In addition, he also knew two ways to enter the Divine Mountain of Life.

One is to become a Holy Ancestor, and then go through a series of assessments to become a Holy Ancestor who will live forever in the Divine Mountain of Life.

Or if he becomes an ancestor-level existence, then no one will dare to stop him.

This is not realistic!

The second method is the once-in-a-millennium battle for the inheritance of the Divine Mountain of Life, where each tree city has a quota, and once you get this quota, you can enter the Divine Mountain of Life and obtain the inheritance of the Divine Mountain of Life.

Now it is still 300 years before the inheritance of the Sacred Mountain of Life!
